name: facct-skills
description: Depth pack for ACM FAccT: interdisciplinary responsible-AI routing, OpenReview mutually-anonymous submission, the Accept/Revise/Reject revise-and-resubmit cycle, ACM acmart archival proceedings, the required endmatter statements, datasheet/model-card documentation, and the co-located CRAFT program.

plugins.name: facct-skills
plugins.description: Twelve FAccT-specific skills for the ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency, spanning fairness/accountability/transparency as first-class contributions across CS, law, social science, humanities, and policy, grounded in the FAccT 2026 CFP and Author/Reviewer Guides, facctconference.org, the ACM Digital Library, and dblp.
